description: B3 / FGAP-045 — item-level read at the tool surface. (1) readBlockItem(cwd, block, id) → ItemRecord|null (block-scoped item-by-id; reuses filterBlockItems id-eq + take-first; additive vs whole-substrate resolve-item-by-id). (2) readBlockPage(cwd, block, {offset=0, limit=50}) → {items, total, hasMore} (reuses readBlock + discoverArrayKey + slice; richer shape per FGAP-045 spec, not a bare array). Both in project-sdk.ts. Dual-surface (DEC-0019/0020): library + Pi tools read-block-item / read-block-page (truncateHead) + CLIs read-block-item.ts / read-block-page.ts + tests. Edge semantics mirror filterBlockItems/readBlock (missing-block throws, no-array → null/{empty}, multiple-arrays throws, not-found → null, offset≥total → empty+total+hasMore:false). Plan: ~/.claude/plans/idempotent-dancing-wilkes.md ACTIVE.
acceptance_criteria: readBlockItem returns the item for a known block+id, null on not-found, propagates missing-block/multiple-arrays throws, null on no-array block

readBlockPage returns {items,total,hasMore} with offset/limit defaults (0/50); total is FULL count; hasMore = offset+limit<total; offset≥total → empty items + correct total + hasMore:false; no-array → {items:[],total:0,hasMore:false}
Pi tools read-block-item + read-block-page registered (truncateHead 50KB idiom); CLIs read-block-item.ts + read-block-page.ts (exit 0/2/3, --format table)
build/check/test green; runtime demo via CLI on real .project (framework-gaps page total 88; read-block-item tasks TASK-001); fresh-context adversarial; skills regen surfaces both tools
notes: Foreground Write agent for source per feedback_no_adhoc_dev; orchestrator runs npm/tsx/git. Closes FGAP-045. B3 of the in-pi tool-surface program; next B4 FGAP-043 (cross-block joins).
